profile.name: Bishoy Kamel Mamdouh
profile.title: AI Engineer
profile.subtitle: AI Engineer | RAG Systems | Computer Vision | NLP | AI Agents
profile.summary: Computer Engineering student passionate about Artificial Intelligence and real-world problems. Experienced in AI projects including epileptic seizure recognition using LSTM and GANs, handwritten medical prescription data extraction using computer vision and NLP, and currently working on RAG systems and AI Agents to build reliable and context-aware AI applications.

experience.title: Instructor
experience.description: Delivered interactive robotics sessions to primary school students, teaching basic programming, electronics, and problem-solving through hands-on projects while fostering engagement and creativity.

certifications.title: Samsung Innovation Campus Scholarship - AI Track
certifications.description: Gained practical experience in Python programming, probability, statistics, linear algebra, data analysis, web scraping, and building AI models including machine learning, deep learning, computer vision, NLP, GANs, and model deployment.

certifications.title: Full Embedded Systems Diploma
certifications.description: Completed a full Embedded Systems Diploma under the supervision of Engineer Mohamed Tarek.

certifications.title: Oral Communication B23 (CEFR)
certifications.description: English Oral Communication B2-C1 CEFR course focused on speaking, listening, reading, and writing for academic and professional communication.

projects.title: RAG Question Answering System
projects.description: Developed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation question answering system using FastAPI, integrating LLMs with a PostgreSQL-backed retrieval pipeline. Implemented API endpoints, managed database migrations with Alembic, and containerized the application using Docker.

projects.title: Extraction of Information from Handwritten Prescriptions
projects.description: Built a system using image preprocessing and OCR techniques to structure key medical prescription data including drug names, dosages, and instructions. Deployed the solution as an API using FastAPI.

projects.title: Epileptic Seizure Recognition
projects.description: Developed deep learning models including ANN, LSTM, and GANs to process time-series data and detect seizure patterns.

projects.title: Brain Tumor Segmentation | U-Net
projects.description: Developed a U-Net based segmentation model to accurately segment tumor regions from medical imaging data.

projects.title: Table Extraction using YOLO
projects.description: Built a YOLO-based system to detect and localize tables in documents, then extract structured data using VLM and export it into CSV format.

projects.title: Startup Success Prediction
projects.description: Built a machine learning project using data cleaning, feature engineering, missing value handling, and model training to predict startup outcomes.

projects.title: Linux System Programming
projects.description: Implemented multiple custom shells including Femto, Pico, Nano, and Micro Shell, plus core Unix utilities demonstrating process management, command parsing, and low-level system calls.

projects.title: Tazkarti
projects.description: Developed a Bus Ticket Booking Management System as part of a Software Engineering course, applying SDLC principles with authentication, booking management, seat allocation, and revenue tracking.

projects.title: Embedded Projects
projects.description: Worked on multiple embedded systems projects including door locker security system, car parking sensor, smart home automation, stopwatch system, safe locker application, and voting machine.
